text: type by running: echo $SHELL /bin/zsh → You're using zsh (macOS default) /bin/zsh → You're using zsh (macOS default) /bin/bash → You're using bash (Linux default) /bin/bash → You're using bash (Linux default) Step 2) Add model setting to your shell config: For ZSH users (macOS) Opus 4.7: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-7"' >> ~/.zshrc Opus 4.7: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-7"' >> ~/.zshrc Sonnet 4.6: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-sonnet-4-6"' >> ~/.zshrc Sonnet 4.6: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-sonnet-4-6"' >> ~/.zshrc Opus 4.6: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-6"' >> ~/.zshrc Opus 4.6: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-6"' >> ~/.zshrc Opus 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-5-20251101"' >> ~/.zshrc Opus 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-5-20251101"' >> ~/.zshrc Haiku 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"' >> ~/.zshrc Haiku 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"' >> ~/.zshrc Sonnet 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-7"' >> ~/.bashrc Opus 4.7: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-7"' >> ~/.bashrc Sonnet 4.6: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-sonnet-4-6"' >> ~/.bashrc Sonnet ~/.bashrc Opus 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-5-20251101"' >> ~/.bashrc Opus 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-opus-4-5-20251101"' >> ~/.bashrc Haiku 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"' >> ~/.bashrc Haiku 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"' >> ~/.bashrc Sonnet 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"' >> ~/.bashrc Sonnet 4.5: echo 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL="claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"' >> ~/.bashrc Step 3) Apply the changes: For ZSH: source ~/.zshrc For ZSH: source ~/.zshrc For BASH: source ~/.bashrc For BASH: source ~/.bashrc Step 4) Close Terminal completely, then reopen it. Step 5) Start Claude Code in a fresh Terminal session: claude . Now your chosen model will be the default for all future Claude Code sessions.
